layers.description: Layers from lowest to highest precedence. Strings map to .rulesync.{name}/; objects may pull from an npm package and/or declare filename sublayers.

name.description: Layer name (used for logging and .rulesync.{name}/). Defaults from the package basename when omitted.

package.description: npm package to read as this layer (e.g. @acme/ai-rules)

path.description: Subpath inside the package (overrides package.json rulelayers root)

sublayers.description: Ordered low → high filename suffixes within this layer (must be unique across layers; may reuse a physical layer name, e.g. user)

standaloneSuffix.description: Filename marker that keeps a sublayer suffix in the output path for this layer (default: standalone). Requires sublayers. Must not collide with this layer's sublayers.

command.description: Executable to run after merge (default: rulesync)

args.description: Arguments passed to the rulesync command
